entry.title: Porsche 911 GT3 | Minimal Motorsport Wall Art | 8 Panel Split Wall Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 499.00 - 799.00 (3 variants)

Premium motorsport-inspired wall artwork featuring the Porsche 911 GT3 in a clean monochrome performance aesthetic.

Designed with modern technical typography, aggressive GT styling, and a luxury automotive layout that transforms your wall into a high-end racing inspired setup.


Product Details:

  • Printed on 300 GSM premium matte sheet
  • 8-panel split design for a large cinematic wall display
  • Minimal monochrome Porsche GT3 artwork
  • Sharp detailing with motorsport-inspired layout styling
  • Frame not included

Perfect For:

  • Gaming & workstation setups
  • Luxury car themed rooms
  • Modern monochrome wall aesthetics
  • Porsche & performance car enthusiasts

Note: Slight color variation may occur due to lighting and screen differences.

entry.title: Personalize Your Wall Space | 8 Panel Split Wall Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 529.00 - 829.00 (3 variants)

Turn Your Favorite Photo into an 8-Panel Wall Setup

Create a stunning wall aesthetic with your own image, split into 8 perfectly aligned posters. Whether it’s your car, bike, memories, or aesthetic shots — this setup instantly upgrades your space.

How It Works

  1. Upload your image
  2. We split it into 8 panels
  3. You receive a complete wall-ready poster set

What You Get

  • 8 individual posters (1 image split into 8 parts)
  • Premium quality print on thick matte paper
  • Clean alignment for a seamless wall look

Size Options

  • A4 Set (8 Posters) – Compact wall setup
  • A3 Set (8 Posters) – Medium size aesthetic
  • 13×19 Set (8 Posters) – Large premium wall look

Important Notes

  • Upload high-quality images for the best print result
  • Your image will be automatically split into 8 panels, so slight cropping may happen
  • Keep the main subject centered for better alignment
  • Not ideal for images with important details near the edges

Installation

  • These posters are not self-adhesive
  • We recommend using glue dots for easy wall sticking
  • Posters can be adjusted and removed carefully

Delivery

  • Prepaid: Express shipping (3–6 days)
  • COD: Standard shipping (6–12 days)

Perfect For

  • Car & bike posters
  • Couple photos & memories
  • Aesthetic room setups
  • Gifting

entry.title: 1966 Shelby Mustang GT350 | Muscle Car Wall Art | 8 Panel Split Wall Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 499.00 - 799.00 (3 variants)

Celebrate the legacy of American performance with this 1966 Shelby Mustang GT350 wall poster. Featuring the iconic Cobra Mustang in a bold red finish with classic racing stripes, this artwork captures the power and timeless design of one of the most legendary muscle cars ever built.

Developed by racing legend Carroll Shelby, the GT350 transformed the Ford Mustang into a true performance machine. With aggressive styling, track-ready engineering, and unmistakable heritage, the 1966 Shelby Mustang remains a symbol of pure American muscle.

Designed with a cinematic automotive aesthetic and bold “1966” typography, this poster is perfect for car enthusiasts, Mustang fans, gaming setups, garages, and modern room decor.

✔ Premium matte poster print
✔ High-definition automotive artwork
✔ Perfect for bedrooms, gaming rooms, and car-themed spaces
✔ Ideal gift for Mustang and classic car lovers

Bring the spirit of American muscle history to your wall with this legendary Shelby GT350 poster.

entry.title: GTR | VECTOR STYLE CARS #01 | 8 Panel Split Wall Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 499.00 - 799.00 (3 variants)

Bring the classic street-racing era to your wall with this 8-Panel Split Wall Set, featuring a legendary blue performance car in a bold, poster-style layout with clean typography, racing stats, and a high-contrast blue/white/orange palette.

Designed for gaming rooms, car setups, studios, and desk walls, the 4 × 2 split layout creates a premium gallery effect that looks insane from a distance and even better up close.

What you’ll receive

  • 1 Set = 8 Panels (4 × 2 layout)

  • High-detail print with sharp textures + racing-poster vibe

  • Perfect for desk setups, gaming corners, and garage-themed rooms

Size options (final trimmed size)

We print on full sheets with small white margins and manually trim borders for a clean finish—so the sizes below are the final set size after trimming:

  • A4 Sheet Set: 32.7 × 23 in

  • A3 Sheet Set: 46 × 33 in

  • 13×19 Sheet Set: 50 × 37 in

Note: Manual trimming may cause a slight size variation (±0.5 in).

Installation note: Frames / wall tapes are not included. You can add our wall-stick option at checkout for easy pasting.

entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 499.00 - 799.00 (3 variants)

Bring a bold off-road, adventure aesthetic to your space with this DEFENDER 8-Panel Split Wall Set. Featuring a rugged SUV profile, dark premium tones, and strong industrial typography, this artwork is made for people who love power, travel, and no-limits driving.

The design comes in an 8-panel split (4 × 2 layout) that creates a premium “gallery wall” look—perfect for desk setups, gaming rooms, garages, studios, and modern bedrooms.

What you’ll receive

  • 1 Set = 8 Panels (4 × 2 layout)

  • High-detail print with sharp textures + premium black aesthetic

  • Best suited for wide walls and setup backgrounds

Size options (final trimmed size)

We print on full sheets with small white margins and manually trim borders for a clean finish—so the sizes below are the final set size after trimming:

  • A4 Sheet Set: 32.7 × 23 in

  • A3 Sheet Set: 46 × 33 in

Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 499.00 - 799.00 (3 variants)

Upgrade your wall with pure grind energy. This HUSTLE 8-Panel Split Wall Set blends a bold “HUSTLE” typographic backdrop, raining-cash visuals, and a sharp black-and-green money-tone aesthetic—made for people who think in goals, discipline, and results.

The split layout comes as 8 panels (4 × 2), creating a premium “gallery wall” look that hits hard above a desk setup, gaming station, office, studio, or hustle corner.

  • 1 Set = 8 Panels (4 × 2 layout)

  • High-detail print with strong contrast + cinematic vibe

Turn your wall into a daily reminder to show up, push harder, and stay consistent. This DISCIPLINE 8-Panel Split Wall Set features a powerful anime-style silhouette, bold red minimal layout, and heavy gothic typography—built for anyone who lives by routine, training, and self-control.

Perfect for gym rooms, gaming setups, studios, bedrooms, and motivation corners, this split set creates a premium “gallery wall” feel with a strong central focus and clean negative space.

What you’ll receive

  • 1 Set = 8 Panels (4 × 2 layout)

  • High-detail print with sharp contrast + clean typography

  • Looks best on wide walls (desk setup / gym wall / studio background)

Size options (final trimmed size)

entry.title: BMW M4 DOMINANCE | Super Car | 8 Panel Split Wall Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 499.00 - 799.00 (3 variants)

Bring high-performance energy to your space with this DOMINANCE 8-Panel Split Wall Set—a bold, modern composition built around a striking neon performance coupe, cinematic road scene, and aggressive typography. The design is split into 8 panels (4 × 2 layout) to create a premium, gallery-style wall look that instantly upgrades any room.

This artwork combines clean automotive aesthetics, street-racing attitude, and minimal yet powerful text elements—perfect for gamers, car lovers, creators, and anyone who likes their wall to feel fast.

What you’ll receive

  • 1 Set = 8 Panels (split design)

  • High-detail print with sharp textures + strong contrast

  • Works best above a desk, gaming setup, studio wall, or garage-themed room

Size options (final trimmed size)

We print on full sheets with a small white margin, then manually trim borders for a clean finish—so the size below is the final set size after trimming:

  • A4 Sheet Set: 32.7 × 23 in

  • A3 Sheet Set: 46 × 33 in

  • 13×19 Sheet Set: 50 × 37 in

Note: Because trimming is manual, final size can vary slightly (±0.5 in).

Installation note: Frames / wall tapes are not included. You can add our wall-stick option at checkout for easy pasting.
